heading: The Creation
prose: In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth.
But the earth was unseen and unready, and darkness was upon the abyss, and spirit of God bore upon the water.

words.kjv_def: but, on the other hand, and
on the top, above, superior to
on the top, above, superior to

prose: And God said, Let there be light! And there was light.
And God beheld the light that it was good. And God parted between the light and between the darkness.
And God called the light, Day, and the darkness he called, Night; and there was evening and there was morning, day one.

words.kjv_def: early in the morning, at dawn

prose: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the water, and let it be for parting between water and water!
And God made the firmament, and God parted between the water which was underneath the firmament, and between the water above the firmament.

words.kjv_def: on the top, above, superior to

prose: And God called the firmament, Heaven. And God beheld that it was good; and there was evening and there was morning, the second day.

words.kjv_def: early in the morning, at dawn
second, in the second place, for the second time

prose: And God said, Let the water underneath the heaven come together into one gathering, and let the dry land appear! And it was so. And the water underneath the heaven gathered together into their gatherings, and the dry land appeared.

words.kjv_def: he, she, it, they, them, same

prose: And God called the dry land, Earth; and the collections of the waters he called, Seas. And God beheld that it was good.

And God said, Let the earth grow pasturage of grass sowing seed according to type, and according to likeness, and the fruitful tree producing fruit which the seed of it is in it, according to type upon the earth! And it was so.

prose: And God beheld that it was good. And there was evening and there was morning, the third day.

words.kjv_def: early in the morning, at dawn

prose: And God said, Let there be luminaries in the firmament of the heaven for giving light upon the earth, to part between the day and between the night! And let them be for signs, and for times, and for days, and for years!

words.kjv_def: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

prose: And let them be for giving light in the firmament of the heaven, so as to shine upon the earth! And it was so.

words.kjv_def: on, to, against, on the basis of, at

prose: And God made the two great luminaries; the greater luminary for beginnings of the day, and the lesser luminary for beginnings of the night, and the stars.
And God put them in the firmament of the heaven, so as to shine upon the earth,

prose: and to begin the day and the night, and to part between the light and between the darkness. And God beheld that it was good.
And there was evening and there was morning, the fourth day.

words.kjv_def: early in the morning, at dawn

prose: And God said, Let the waters bring forth reptiles of living lives, and flying winged creatures upon the earth below the firmament of the heaven! And it was so.

prose: And God said, Let the earth bring forth living life according to its type — four-footed, and reptiles, and wild beasts of the earth according to type! And it was so.
